title: Dinosaurs: Extinction Park
description: Prehistoric World Filled With Friendly And Dangerous Dinosaurs. Tame And Care For Them. Build The Biggest Jurrassic Park. | 🦖  T-rex, Raptors, Spinosaurus...
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Dinosaurs_Extinction_Park/BH_Dinosaurs_Extinction_Park_header.webp) **
The Ultimate Minecraft Dinosaur Experience
** # ![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Dinosaurs_Extinction_Park/BH_Dinosaurs_Extinction_Park_description.webp) ### 💡 About Dinosaurs: Exctinction Park offers a variety of prehistoric creatures that are brought back to life through discovering bones, extracting DNA, creating Embryos, and making eggs. ### 🦖 Prehistoric Creatures - Discover many prehistoric creatures such as mammoths, smilodons, terror birds, dodos, and more. ### 🦴 Fossils & Archaeology - Unearth ancient relics - revive magnificent dinosaurs - piece together the mysteries of a forgotten era. ### 😈 Challenge Yourself ### ♥️ Tame Them, Ride Them ### 🧬 Recover Dna # ### ✨ Performant with Shaders We crafted this modpack to be light weight, optimized and beautiful. - Shaders -> Complementary Reimagined - Many optimization mods - Light Weight
Tips on getting more performance - Disable Shaders: Options -> Video Settings -> Oculus -> Shaders: Disabled - Lower Render Distance: Options -> Video settings -> Render distance - Lower Simulation Distance: Options -> Video settings -> Simulation distance - Allocate More Ram: Look at Tutorial from [Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/clients/index.php?rp=/knowledgebase/1866/How-to-allocate-more-ram-on-modded-Minecraft-launchers.html), We recommend 4-6gb - Update All your drivers****
